title: eucephalus perelegans
intro: Eucephalus perelegans, also known as Western Yarrow or Coyote Mint, is a perennial herb native to the western regions of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which can help to treat various health issues such as wounds, fever, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Eucephalus perelegans include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Eucephalus perelegans can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's essential oils in aromatherapy or topical applications.
